attributes.description: Alerts when `vcenter.vm.memory.swapped > 0`. The hypervisor is swapping VM memory to disk — severe performance loss.
attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] VM memory swapping

investigation_guide.blob:
## vSphere VM memory swapping

### What fired
`vcenter.vm.memory.swapped > 0` during the window.

### Why it matters
Hypervisor-level swapping of VM memory is the worst-case memory pressure signal — orders-of-magnitude latency hit on the VM.

### Triage
1. Always address immediately.

### Remediation
- vMotion the VM to a healthier host.
- Add host memory.

### Tuning
- Always P1.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
// VM memory swapping: hypervisor swapping to disk — severe performance degradation
// Any non-zero value is critical; adjust threshold if needed for noise reduction
| WHERE vcenter.vm.memory.swapped IS NOT NULL AND vcenter.vm.memory.swapped > 0
| STATS swapped_mib = MAX(vcenter.vm.memory.swapped) BY vcenter.datacenter.name, vcenter.cluster.name, vcenter.host.name, vcenter.vm.name
| SORT swapped_mib DESC
| LIMIT 20
